title: More Armor Stand Variants (MStV+)
description: Armor Stands for every kind of wood - A 'More Stick Variants' Add-On
body: [![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/lieon-studios-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios) [![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Stick-Variants/badge/requires-mstv.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-stick-variants) Community: [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) Source: [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Armor-Stand-Variants) pnku: [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_top.svg) ## More Armor Stand Variants Tired of having to put your armor on oak mannequins? Now you can put it on wood of all types. ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Armor-Stand-Variants/pres/mr_desc_banner.png) ### Adding 11 new _Armor Stands_ to Minecraft! ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_top.svg) ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/6asc1.webp) A presentation of all newly added armor stands using '[More Frame Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-frame-variants/)' to display the item textures. ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_bottom.svg) [**![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/b8t6h.gif)**]()
